mechanism_narrative: Elevated federal funds rates increase the discount rate for future corporate earnings, directly suppressing S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in high-rate periods are not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A rapid three-month increase in the unemployment rate exceeding 0.3 percentage points signals imminent labor market deterioration, triggering immediate risk-off positioning and negative S&P 500 returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: Forward 5-day returns remain positive in >55% of triggered instances or trigger frequency drops below 2 per year.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent expansion in retail sales and housing starts confirms broad-based consumer demand strength, driving corporate revenue growth and generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Joint signal produces negative returns in >60% of cases or interaction term loses statistical significance (p > 0.10) in multivariate regression.

mechanism_narrative: Sustained month-over-month growth in the index of industrial production reflects expanding manufacturing capacity and supply-side resilience, which supports equity valuations and yields positive S&P 500 returns over 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Signal direction reverses to negative during tightening periods or predictive power vanishes when inflation exceeds 3.0%.

mechanism_narrative: Consistent monthly growth in total nonfarm payrolls indicates a healthy labor market that sustains consumer spending and corporate profitability, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Rank IC falls below 0.02 over any 24-month rolling window or positive return frequency drops below 50%.

mechanism_narrative: When the consumer price index exceeds 320.0, persistent inflationary pressures trigger expectations of aggressive central bank tightening, causing immediate equity sell-offs and negative S&P 500 returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: Forward 5-day returns are positive in >60% of threshold-crossing instances or inflation fails to predict short-term volatility spikes.

mechanism_narrative: Synchronized quarterly growth in real GDP and monthly retail sales confirms robust aggregate demand, reducing recession probabilities and generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Interaction effect becomes statistically insignificant or forward returns turn negative in >55% of synchronized growth periods.

mechanism_narrative: Housing starts falling below 1.2 million units signals a sharp contraction in construction activity and consumer confidence, forecasting economic deceleration and negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Forward 60-day returns remain positive in >65% of triggered instances or housing starts fail to lead equity returns by at least 3 months.
